activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception - not activated
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value: Swedish Match Industries AB, Box 84, SE-522 22, TIDAHOLM, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Swedish Match Industries AB, Västra Drottningvägen 15, P.O Box 84, 52230 Tidaholm, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor Swedish Match Industries AB is explicitly identified in the invoice in multiple fields including header, address blocks, VAT and organization numbers, matching the certificate's consignor name and country Sweden after allowed normalization. No other contradictory party found.

consignee.certificate_value: Peter & Company Limited, P O Box 84-85, CUL DE SAC, CASTRIES, Saint Lucia
consignee.invoice_value: PETER & COMPANY LIMITED, P O BOX 84-85, CUL DE SAC, CASTRIES, ST. LUCIA
consignee.motivation: Consignee Peter & Company Limited is explicitly identified in the invoice under the invoice address and consignee fields, matching the certificate consignee name and country Saint Lucia after normalization. The primary invoicing address corresponds to the consignee. Country matches exactly.

goods_description.certificate_value: Safety Matches, 996 cartons of Safety Matches, See attached invoice 632597 dated 260305 for item description
goods_description.invoice_value: Goods description lines 'Safety Matches' with item number, quantities and detailed lines for various 'Three Stars' items
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with explicit reference to invoice number 632597 and date 260305 corresponding exactly with invoice number 000632597 and invoice date 2026-03-05 (normalized). The general description 'Safety Matches' matches invoice description. Article numbers are listed in invoice (0212215, 0230015, 0222186, 0232216). No contradictions found.

quantity.invoice_value: 996 CRT Safety Matches, average gross weight KG 7 324
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity 996 cartons and gross weight 7324 kg matches invoice quantity 996 CRT and average gross weight 7324 kg after normalization removing thousand separators. Weight category 'gross' is confirmed by certificate's 'gross' annotation and invoice's 'average gross weight KG'. No conflicting weight or quantities found.

origin.motivation: The certificate indicates origins as European Community and Sweden. The invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Sweden is an EU member state as per certificate issue date, therefore EU normalization rules apply and origin is verified as matching.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All key control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) have been verified as matching with allowed normalization and no contradictions found. The certificate explicitly references the invoice enabling verification of general goods description. Document pair is consistent.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprung är verifierade. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
